context: Essential verb for describing physical examinations: 'El médico examina al paciente' (The doctor examines the patient).

examples.spanish: El médico examina al paciente.
examples.english: The doctor examines the patient.

examples.spanish: La enfermera examina los síntomas del paciente.
examples.english: The nurse examines the patient's symptoms.

context: Essential medical verb used when administering medications: 'Voy a inyectarle una dosis de antibiótico' (I'm going to inject you with an antibiotic dose).

examples.spanish: El enfermero inyectó la vacuna al paciente.
examples.english: The nurse injected the vaccine into the patient.

examples.spanish: El médico necesita inyectar anestesia antes de la cirugía.
examples.english: The doctor needs to inject anesthesia before surgery.

context: Essential verb for medical professionals: 'El médico prescribe antibióticos para la infección' (The doctor prescribes antibiotics for the infection).

examples.spanish: El médico prescribió antibióticos para la infección.
examples.english: The doctor prescribed antibiotics for the infection.

examples.spanish: La enfermera prescribió reposo absoluto durante una semana.
examples.english: The nurse prescribed complete rest for one week.

context: Essential medical verb used to report clinical findings: 'Le diagnosticamos diabetes' (We diagnosed him with diabetes).

examples.spanish: El médico diagnosticó una infección bacteriana después de realizar los análisis.
examples.english: The doctor diagnosed a bacterial infection after running the tests.

examples.spanish: Es importante diagnosticar la enfermedad en las primeras etapas para un mejor tratamiento.
examples.english: It is important to diagnose the disease in the early stages for better treatment.

context: Essential surgical verb used when describing wound closure techniques: 'El cirujano suturó la incisión con precisión.'

examples.spanish: El cirujano debe suturar la herida después de la operación.
examples.english: The surgeon must suture the wound after the operation.

examples.spanish: La enfermera va a suturar los puntos con cuidado para evitar infecciones.
examples.english: The nurse is going to suture the stitches carefully to prevent infections.

context: Essential verb in medical practice for patient care instructions: 'Hidrate al paciente cada dos horas' (Hydrate the patient every two hours).

examples.spanish: Es importante hidratar al paciente después de la cirugía.
examples.english: It is important to hydrate the patient after surgery.

examples.spanish: El enfermero necesita hidratar la piel del paciente quemado.
examples.english: The nurse needs to hydrate the burned patient's skin.

context: Essential in medical contexts for continuous patient observation; e.g., 'Monitoreamos los signos vitales durante la cirugía' (We monitored vital signs during surgery).

examples.spanish: El médico monitorea los signos vitales del paciente durante la cirugía.
examples.english: The doctor monitors the patient's vital signs during surgery.

examples.spanish: Las enfermeras monitorean constantemente el ritmo cardíaco en la unidad de cuidados intensivos.
examples.english: The nurses constantly monitor the heart rate in the intensive care unit.

context: Essential verb for documenting patient assessments: 'Evalúo los síntomas del paciente' (I evaluate the patient's symptoms).

examples.spanish: El médico debe evaluar los síntomas del paciente cuidadosamente.
examples.english: The doctor must carefully evaluate the patient's symptoms.

examples.spanish: La enfermera evaluará el progreso de la recuperación después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The nurse will evaluate the recovery progress after surgery.

context: Essential verb in emergency medicine; used when describing cardiopulmonary resuscitation procedures and patient recovery protocols.

examples.spanish: Los paramédicos tuvieron que reanimar al paciente que sufrió un infarto.
examples.english: The paramedics had to resuscitate the patient who suffered a heart attack.

examples.spanish: El equipo de urgencias logró reanimar al niño después de practicarle la reanimación cardiopulmonar.
examples.english: The emergency team managed to revive the child after performing CPR on him.

context: Essential medical verb for describing patient care: 'Tratamos la infección con antibióticos' (We treat the infection with antibiotics).

examples.spanish: El médico trata la infección con antibióticos.
examples.english: The doctor treats the infection with antibiotics.

examples.spanish: Vamos a tratar al paciente con una nueva terapia.
examples.english: We are going to treat the patient with a new therapy.

context: Essential surgical verb; use present to describe procedures: 'El cirujano opera al paciente.' Use subjunctive in recommendations: 'Es necesario que lo operemos cuanto antes.'

examples.spanish: El cirujano va a operar al paciente mañana por la mañana.
examples.english: The surgeon is going to operate on the patient tomorrow morning.

examples.spanish: Los médicos operaron al niño de apendicitis hace una semana.
examples.english: The doctors operated on the child for appendicitis a week ago.

context: Essential verb for hospital documentation: 'El paciente ingresó en la planta de cirugía ayer' (The patient was admitted to the surgical ward yesterday).

examples.spanish: El paciente fue ingresado en el hospital después del accidente.
examples.english: The patient was admitted to the hospital after the accident.

examples.spanish: La enfermera ingresó los datos médicos del nuevo paciente en el sistema.
examples.english: The nurse entered the patient's medical data into the system.

context: Essential for describing fluid removal procedures: 'Drenamos el absceso quirúrgicamente' (We drained the abscess surgically).

examples.spanish: El cirujano necesita drenar el absceso para aliviar la infección.
examples.english: The surgeon needs to drain the abscess to relieve the infection.

examples.spanish: Después de la operación, colocaron un tubo para drenar el líquido acumulado.
examples.english: After the surgery, they placed a tube to drain the accumulated fluid.

context: Essential for medical contexts: 'Te refiero al cardiólogo' (I'm referring you to the cardiologist) or 'Se refiere a los síntomas' (It refers to the symptoms).

examples.spanish: El paciente se refiere a un dolor persistente en el pecho.
examples.english: The patient refers to a persistent pain in the chest.

examples.spanish: La enfermera refiere los síntomas del paciente al médico especialista.
examples.english: The nurse refers the patient's symptoms to the specialist doctor.

context: Essential verb for describing physical examination procedures; use imperativeFormal when instructing patients to breathe deeply during lung auscultation.

examples.spanish: El médico ausculta los pulmones del paciente con un estetoscopio.
examples.english: The doctor auscultates the patient's lungs with a stethoscope.

examples.spanish: La enfermera ausculta el corazón para detectar cualquier soplo anormal.
examples.english: The nurse auscultates the heart to detect any abnormal murmur.

context: Essential verb for physical examination; physicians use this to describe tactile assessment of organs and tissues.

examples.spanish: El médico palpó el abdomen del paciente para detectar cualquier anomalía.
examples.english: The doctor palpated the patient's abdomen to detect any abnormality.

examples.spanish: La enfermera palpa la zona inflamada para evaluar el grado de sensibilidad.
examples.english: The nurse palpates the inflamed area to assess the degree of sensitivity.

context: Essential verb in radiology departments; use to order or describe radiographic imaging procedures in patient assessment and documentation.

examples.spanish: El radiólogo necesita radiografiar el tobillo del paciente para detectar fracturas.
examples.english: The radiologist needs to X-ray the patient's ankle to detect fractures.

examples.spanish: Vamos a radiografiar el pecho para verificar si hay neumonía.
examples.english: We are going to X-ray the chest to check for pneumonia.

context: Essential in medical contexts: 'Necesitamos analizar los resultados de laboratorio' (We need to analyze the lab results).

examples.spanish: El médico debe analizar los resultados de la biopsia.
examples.english: The doctor must analyze the biopsy results.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos analizar la muestra de sangre para diagnosticar la enfermedad.
examples.english: We need to analyze the blood sample to diagnose the disease.

context: Essential verb for prescribing medications: 'Necesitamos medicar al paciente con antibióticos.'

examples.spanish: El médico decidió medicar al paciente con antibióticos para tratar la infección.
examples.english: The doctor decided to medicate the patient with antibiotics to treat the infection.

examples.spanish: Es necesario medicar al enfermo inmediatamente para aliviar su dolor.
examples.english: It is necessary to medicate the patient immediately to relieve his pain.

context: Essential verb for physicians: 'Le receto este medicamento tres veces al día' (I prescribe this medication three times daily).

examples.spanish: El médico le recetó antibióticos para la infección.
examples.english: The doctor prescribed antibiotics for the infection.

examples.spanish: La doctora me recetó una nueva medicina para controlar la presión arterial.
examples.english: The doctor prescribed me a new medicine to control blood pressure.

context: Essential verb for admitting patients; use 'Vamos a hospitalizarlo' to inform families of admission decisions.

examples.spanish: El paciente fue hospitalizado después del accidente grave.
examples.english: The patient was hospitalized after the serious accident.

examples.spanish: Decidieron hospitalizar al niño por la neumonía severa.
examples.english: They decided to hospitalize the child due to severe pneumonia.

context: Essential medical term used to describe the administration of blood or blood products to a patient; commonly used in emergency, surgical, and hematology settings.

examples.spanish: El cirujano necesita transfundir sangre al paciente durante la operación.
examples.english: The surgeon needs to transfuse blood to the patient during the operation.

examples.spanish: Los médicos decidieron transfundir plasma fresco congelado para detener la hemorragia.
examples.english: The doctors decided to transfuse fresh frozen plasma to stop the hemorrhage.

context: Essential medical term for airway management; used in emergency, anesthesia, and critical care settings to describe placement of an endotracheal tube.

examples.spanish: El anestesiólogo necesita intubar al paciente antes de la cirugía.
examples.english: The anesthesiologist needs to intubate the patient before surgery.

examples.spanish: Los médicos decidieron intubar al paciente porque sus niveles de oxígeno eran muy bajos.
examples.english: The doctors decided to intubate the patient because his oxygen levels were very low.

context: Essential in respiratory medicine: 'Necesitamos ventilar al paciente mecánicamente' (We need to mechanically ventilate the patient).

examples.spanish: Es necesario ventilar la sala de cirugía después de cada operación.
examples.english: It is necessary to ventilate the operating room after each surgery.

examples.spanish: El respirador artificial ventila los pulmones del paciente en estado crítico.
examples.english: The artificial ventilator ventilates the lungs of the critically ill patient.

context: Essential in cardiology and urology; use present tense for procedural explanations and preterite to document completed catheterizations in patient records.

examples.spanish: El cardiólogo necesita cateterizar al paciente para realizar el cateterismo cardíaco.
examples.english: The cardiologist needs to catheterize the patient to perform cardiac catheterization.

examples.spanish: Los médicos decidieron cateterizar la vena central del paciente en la unidad de cuidados intensivos.
examples.english: The doctors decided to catheterize the patient's central vein in the intensive care unit.

context: Essential medical verb used in hospital and clinical protocols to describe sterilization procedures: 'Desinfecte el área quirúrgica antes de la intervención' (Disinfect the surgical area before the procedure).

examples.spanish: Es importante desinfectar la herida antes de aplicar el vendaje.
examples.english: It is important to disinfect the wound before applying the bandage.

examples.spanish: El enfermero desinfectó el área quirúrgica con alcohol.
examples.english: The nurse disinfected the surgical area with alcohol.

context: Essential verb in surgical and laboratory settings; used when instructing staff on instrument sterilization protocols.

examples.spanish: El cirujano debe esterilizar todos los instrumentos antes de la operación.
examples.english: The surgeon must sterilize all instruments before the operation.

examples.spanish: Es necesario esterilizar el equipo médico para prevenir infecciones.
examples.english: It is necessary to sterilize the medical equipment to prevent infections.

context: Essential surgical verb used in medical consultations and operative reports to describe limb removal procedures.

examples.spanish: El cirujano tuvo que amputar la pierna del paciente debido a la gangrena.
examples.english: The surgeon had to amputate the patient's leg due to gangrene.

examples.spanish: Decidieron amputar el dedo para prevenir la propagación de la infección.
examples.english: They decided to amputate the finger to prevent the spread of infection.

context: Essential in physical therapy and recovery contexts; used when describing treatment plans for patients regaining function after injury or illness.

examples.spanish: El fisioterapeuta va a rehabilitar al paciente después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The physical therapist is going to rehabilitate the patient after surgery.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos rehabilitar su movilidad mediante ejercicios terapéuticos.
examples.english: We need to rehabilitate his mobility through therapeutic exercises.

context: Used by physiotherapists to document treatment sessions: 'Le fisioterapeo la lesión del hombro tres veces por semana.'

examples.spanish: El fisioterapeuta va a fisioterapear al paciente después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The physical therapist is going to provide physical therapy to the patient after surgery.

examples.spanish: Es importante fisioterapear la lesión para recuperar la movilidad completa.
examples.english: It is important to apply physical therapy to the injury to recover full mobility.

context: Essential medical verb used to instruct patients on immunization protocols: 'Necesitamos vacunarle contra la gripe' (We need to vaccinate you against the flu).

examples.spanish: El enfermero va a vacunar al niño contra la gripe.
examples.english: The nurse is going to vaccinate the child against the flu.

examples.spanish: Es importante vacunar a todos los pacientes antes de la cirugía.
examples.english: It is important to vaccinate all patients before surgery.

context: Essential verb for vaccination programs and immunology protocols: 'El pediatra inmuniza a los niños contra el sarampión.'

examples.spanish: El pediatra va a inmunizar a los niños contra la poliomielitis.
examples.english: The pediatrician is going to immunize the children against polio.

examples.spanish: Es importante inmunizar a los pacientes antes de viajar a zonas de riesgo.
examples.english: It is important to immunize patients before traveling to risk areas.

context: Essential in oncology and pathology: 'El médico biopsió el tejido sospechoso para confirmar el diagnóstico.'

examples.spanish: El cirujano decidió biopsiar el tejido sospechoso para descartar malignidad.
examples.english: The surgeon decided to biopsy the suspicious tissue to rule out malignancy.

examples.spanish: Fue necesario biopsiar la lesión cutánea porque presentaba características atípicas.
examples.english: It was necessary to biopsy the skin lesion because it presented atypical characteristics.

context: Essential verb for gastroenterologists and surgeons documenting procedures: 'El médico endoscopió al paciente para evaluar la úlcera gástrica.'

examples.spanish: El gastroenterólogo necesita endoscopiar al paciente para diagnosticar la úlcera.
examples.english: The gastroenterologist needs to perform an endoscopy on the patient to diagnose the ulcer.

examples.spanish: Vamos a endoscopiar las vías respiratorias para buscar la causa de la tos persistente.
examples.english: We are going to endoscope the respiratory tract to find the cause of the persistent cough.

context: Essential verb for radiologists and sonographers: 'Voy a ecografiarle el abdomen' (I'm going to perform an abdominal ultrasound on you).

examples.spanish: El radiólogo va a ecografiar el abdomen del paciente para detectar posibles anomalías.
examples.english: The radiologist is going to ultrasound the patient's abdomen to detect any possible abnormalities.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos ecografiar el corazón del bebé durante el embarazo para asegurar su desarrollo correcto.
examples.english: We need to ultrasound the baby's heart during pregnancy to ensure its proper development.

context: Essential verb for describing surgical procedures: 'El cirujano extrajo la muela' (The surgeon extracted the tooth) or 'Necesitamos extraer sangre' (We need to draw blood).

examples.spanish: El dentista necesita extraer la muela del juicio.
examples.english: The dentist needs to extract the wisdom tooth.

examples.spanish: Los médicos extrajeron la bala del paciente durante la cirugía.
examples.english: The doctors extracted the bullet from the patient during surgery.

context: Essential surgical verb used to describe making precise cuts during operative procedures; commonly used in surgical reports and operative instructions.

examples.spanish: El cirujano decidió incisionar la piel para acceder al tumor.
examples.english: The surgeon decided to incise the skin to access the tumor.

examples.spanish: El médico tuvo que incisionar el absceso para drenar la infección.
examples.english: The doctor had to incise the abscess to drain the infection.

context: Essential surgical term: 'Voy a irrigar la herida con solución salina' (I will irrigate the wound with saline solution).

examples.spanish: El cirujano debe irrigar la herida con solución salina estéril.
examples.english: The surgeon must irrigate the wound with sterile saline solution.

examples.spanish: Durante la operación, irrigaremos la cavidad abdominal para prevenir infecciones.
examples.english: During the operation, we will irrigate the abdominal cavity to prevent infections.

context: Essential verb in medical practice for instructing patients to compress wounds, apply pressure, or during compression therapy procedures.

examples.spanish: El médico debe comprimir la herida para detener la hemorragia.
examples.english: The doctor must compress the wound to stop the bleeding.

examples.spanish: Necesitas comprimir la arteria durante cinco minutos para controlar el sangrado.
examples.english: You need to compress the artery for five minutes to control the bleeding.

context: Essential in orthopedic and emergency medicine: 'Necesitamos inmovilizar la fractura antes de trasladar al paciente' (We need to immobilize the fracture before transferring the patient).

examples.spanish: El médico necesitaba inmovilizar el brazo fracturado del paciente con un yeso.
examples.english: The doctor needed to immobilize the patient's fractured arm with a cast.

examples.spanish: Después del accidente, los paramédicos decidieron inmovilizar la columna vertebral del herido para evitar más daños.
examples.english: After the accident, the paramedics decided to immobilize the injured person's spine to prevent further injury.

context: Essential surgical verb used to describe tissue removal: 'El cirujano resecó el tumor maligno' (The surgeon resected the malignant tumor).

examples.spanish: El cirujano necesita resecar el tejido necrótico para prevenir la infección.
examples.english: The surgeon needs to resect the necrotic tissue to prevent infection.

examples.spanish: Decidieron resecar la porción dañada del intestino durante la operación.
examples.english: They decided to resect the damaged portion of the intestine during surgery.

context: Essential surgical term used when discussing organ or tissue transplantation procedures with patients and medical teams.

examples.spanish: El cirujano va a trasplantar el órgano donado al paciente.
examples.english: The surgeon is going to transplant the donated organ to the patient.

examples.spanish: Después de trasplantar el corazón, el médico monitorea la recuperación del paciente.
examples.english: After transplanting the heart, the doctor monitors the patient's recovery.

context: Essential verb for nephrologists and dialysis technicians: 'El paciente se dializa tres veces por semana' (The patient undergoes dialysis three times per week).

examples.spanish: El nefrólogo debe dializar al paciente tres veces por semana debido a su insuficiencia renal.
examples.english: The nephrologist must dialyze the patient three times a week due to his kidney failure.

examples.spanish: Decidieron dializar al enfermo inmediatamente después de confirmar el diagnóstico de uremia.
examples.english: They decided to dialyze the patient immediately after confirming the diagnosis of uremia.

context: Essential verb for respiratory care: 'Necesitamos oxigenar al paciente inmediatamente' (We need to oxygenate the patient immediately).

examples.spanish: El médico necesita oxigenar al paciente con una mascarilla de oxígeno.
examples.english: The doctor needs to oxygenate the patient with an oxygen mask.

examples.spanish: Es importante oxigenar la sangre del paciente durante la cirugía.
examples.english: It is important to oxygenate the patient's blood during surgery.

context: Used in surgical and pathology contexts to describe the localization or encapsulation of infection, abscess, or pathological process within a defined anatomical region.

examples.spanish: El cirujano tuvo que sediar al paciente antes de la operación.
examples.english: The surgeon had to sedate the patient before the operation.

examples.spanish: Es necesario sediar al enfermo para realizar el procedimiento dental.
examples.english: It is necessary to sedate the patient to perform the dental procedure.

context: Essential verb for anesthesiologists and surgeons to describe administering anesthesia to patients before procedures.

examples.spanish: El anestesiólogo debe anestesiar al paciente antes de la cirugía.
examples.english: The anesthesiologist must anesthetize the patient before surgery.

examples.spanish: Vamos a anestesiar la zona afectada para realizar el procedimiento dental.
examples.english: We are going to anesthetize the affected area to perform the dental procedure.

context: Used in medical contexts to describe patient processions during hospital rounds or the sequential examination of patients in clinical settings.

examples.spanish: Los estudiantes de medicina desfilan en la ceremonia de graduación del hospital.
examples.english: The medical students parade at the hospital graduation ceremony.

examples.spanish: Durante la presentación clínica, los residentes desfilaron ante el jefe de departamento mostrando sus casos.
examples.english: During the clinical presentation, the residents paraded before the department head showing their cases.

context: Essential medical verb for describing bleeding symptoms; use in patient assessments, wound care, and emergency protocols—e.g., 'El paciente sangra abundantemente' (The patient is bleeding heavily).

examples.spanish: La herida sangra abundantemente y necesitamos detener la hemorragia.
examples.english: The wound is bleeding heavily and we need to stop the hemorrhage.

examples.spanish: El paciente sigue sangrando después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The patient continues to bleed after surgery.

context: Essential in medical assessment: use to ask patients about nausea and vomiting symptoms, documented frequency, and associated conditions.

examples.spanish: El paciente comenzó a vomitar después de la anestesia.
examples.english: The patient began to vomit after the anesthesia.

examples.spanish: Si el niño sigue vomitando, debemos llevarlo al hospital.
examples.english: If the child continues to vomit, we must take him to the hospital.

english: to be dying; to be in agony
context: Essential in palliative care and end-of-life documentation to describe a patient's final moments or acute distress.

examples.spanish: El paciente comenzó a agonizar después del accidente grave.
examples.english: The patient began to be in agony after the serious accident.

examples.spanish: Sin tratamiento inmediato, el enfermo agonizará en intenso dolor.
examples.english: Without immediate treatment, the patient will be in severe agony.

context: Used in transfusion and infusion protocols to describe the process of administering fluids or blood products back into a patient's circulatory system.

examples.spanish: El cirujano tuvo que reinfundir confianza al paciente antes de la operación.
examples.english: The surgeon had to restore confidence in the patient before the operation.

examples.spanish: Los médicos reinfundieron esperanza en los familiares del enfermo grave.
examples.english: The doctors restored hope in the family members of the critically ill patient.

context: Essential in ophthalmology and cardiology; used to describe pupil dilation, blood vessel expansion, or cervical dilation during labor.

examples.spanish: El oftalmólogo usó gotas para dilatar las pupilas del paciente.
examples.english: The ophthalmologist used drops to dilate the patient's pupils.

examples.spanish: Durante el parto, el cuello uterino debe dilatar varios centímetros.
examples.english: During labor, the cervix must dilate several centimeters.

context: Médicos utilizan este verbo para describir factores que elevan la presión arterial en pacientes.

examples.spanish: El estrés crónico puede hipertensar al paciente si no se controla adecuadamente.
examples.english: Chronic stress can cause hypertension in the patient if not controlled properly.

examples.spanish: Los malos hábitos alimenticios hipertensan a muchos pacientes en la clínica.
examples.english: Poor eating habits cause hypertension in many patients at the clinic.

context: Essential verb for describing patient stabilization: 'Estabilizamos al paciente después de la intervención quirúrgica.'

examples.spanish: El tratamiento ayudó a estabilizar la condición del paciente después del accidente.
examples.english: The treatment helped stabilize the patient's condition after the accident.

examples.spanish: Los médicos utilizaron medicamentos para estabilizar los signos vitales del enfermo.
examples.english: The doctors used medications to stabilize the patient's vital signs.

context: Essential in medical settings: 'Monitorizamos los signos vitales del paciente durante la cirugía' (We monitored the patient's vital signs during surgery).

examples.spanish: El cardiólogo debe monitorizar los signos vitales del paciente durante la cirugía.
examples.english: The cardiologist must monitor the patient's vital signs during surgery.

examples.spanish: Es importante monitorizar la presión arterial y el nivel de oxígeno en sangre de los pacientes críticos.
examples.english: It is important to monitor blood pressure and blood oxygen levels in critical patients.

context: Essential in oncology and rheumatology: 'Infiltramos anestésico local en la zona' (We infiltrated local anesthetic in the area).

examples.spanish: El cáncer comenzó a infiltrar los tejidos sanos circundantes.
examples.english: The cancer began to infiltrate the surrounding healthy tissues.

examples.spanish: La infección bacteriana logró infiltrar la barrera hematoencefálica.
examples.english: The bacterial infection managed to infiltrate the blood-brain barrier.

context: Essential medical verb used when performing aspiration procedures, such as needle aspiration or airway suctioning: 'Voy a aspirar la secreción' (I'm going to aspirate the secretion).

examples.spanish: El paciente debe aspirar profundamente durante el examen pulmonar.
examples.english: The patient must breathe in deeply during the lung examination.

examples.spanish: La enfermera aspiró las secreciones de las vías respiratorias del paciente.
examples.english: The nurse suctioned the secretions from the patient's airway.

context: Essential verb in surgical contexts for describing minimally invasive diagnostic or therapeutic procedures performed with a laparoscope.

examples.spanish: El cirujano decidió laparoscopiar al paciente para diagnosticar la apendicitis.
examples.english: The surgeon decided to perform laparoscopy on the patient to diagnose appendicitis.

examples.spanish: Fue necesario laparoscopiar a la mujer embarazada debido a los dolores abdominales persistentes.
examples.english: It was necessary to perform laparoscopy on the pregnant woman due to persistent abdominal pain.

context: Essential for medication instructions: 'Tome dos pastillas cada ocho horas' (Take two pills every eight hours).

examples.spanish: El paciente debe tomar la medicina tres veces al día.
examples.english: The patient must take the medicine three times a day.

examples.spanish: Voy a tomar la presión arterial del paciente.
examples.english: I am going to take the patient's blood pressure.

context: Essential verb for patient care: 'Necesitamos controlar su presión arterial' (We need to monitor your blood pressure) or 'El paciente controla su diabetes bien' (The patient manages his diabetes well).

examples.spanish: El médico debe controlar la presión arterial del paciente regularmente.
examples.english: The doctor must monitor the patient's blood pressure regularly.

examples.spanish: Es importante controlar el nivel de glucosa en pacientes diabéticos.
examples.english: It is important to control glucose levels in diabetic patients.

context: Essential verb for medical practice: 'Se administra la medicación intravenosa' (The medication is administered intravenously).

examples.spanish: El enfermero administra la medicación al paciente cada cuatro horas.
examples.english: The nurse administers the medication to the patient every four hours.

examples.spanish: El médico administra la vacuna contra la gripe a todos los pacientes de riesgo.
examples.english: The doctor administers the flu vaccine to all at-risk patients.

context: Essential medical verb for treatment outcomes; commonly used in phrases like 'curar una herida' (to heal a wound) or 'curar una enfermedad' (to cure a disease).

examples.spanish: El médico cura la herida con antiséptico.
examples.english: The doctor treats the wound with antiseptic.

examples.spanish: Este medicamento cura la infección rápidamente.
examples.english: This medication heals the infection quickly.

context: Essential verb used to instruct patients: 'Vendare la herida cada día' (Bandage the wound daily).

examples.spanish: El médico va a vendar la herida con una gasa estéril.
examples.english: The doctor is going to bandage the wound with sterile gauze.

examples.spanish: La enfermera vendará el tobillo del paciente después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The nurse will bandage the patient's ankle after surgery.

english: to fall ill / to become sick
context: Used to describe the onset or development of illness: 'El paciente enfermó hace dos semanas' (The patient became ill two weeks ago).

examples.spanish: El paciente comenzó a enfermar después de la cirugía.
examples.english: The patient began to get sick after the surgery.

examples.spanish: Si no tomas tus medicinas, podrías enfermar gravemente.
examples.english: If you don't take your medicine, you could become seriously ill.

context: Essential verb in construction: 'Instalamos la tubería ayer' (We installed the piping yesterday). Use present progressive for ongoing work: 'Están instalando los cables eléctricos' (They are installing the electrical wires).

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores van a instalar las ventanas nuevas en la casa.
examples.english: The workers are going to install the new windows in the house.

examples.spanish: Debemos instalar el sistema eléctrico antes de terminar la construcción.
examples.english: We must install the electrical system before finishing construction.

context: Essential construction term: 'El obrero suelda las vigas metálicas con precisión' (The worker welds the metal beams precisely).

examples.spanish: El soldador necesita soldar las vigas de acero para construir el puente.
examples.english: The welder needs to weld the steel beams to build the bridge.

examples.spanish: Vamos a soldar las tuberías de cobre en la nueva instalación de fontanería.
examples.english: We are going to weld the copper pipes in the new plumbing installation.

context: Essential in construction contexts: 'Vamos a demoler el edificio antiguo' (We are going to demolish the old building).

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores van a demoler el edificio antiguo la próxima semana.
examples.english: The workers are going to demolish the old building next week.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos demoler esta pared para ampliar la cocina.
examples.english: We need to demolish this wall to expand the kitchen.

context: Essential construction verb for describing the process of making surfaces even or leveling ground and structures during building and site preparation work.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores nivelan el terreno para construir la casa.
examples.english: The workers level the ground to build the house.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos nivelar la base antes de colocar los cimientos.
examples.english: We need to level the base before laying the foundations.

context: Essential construction verb for describing earthmoving operations: 'Los obreros excavan los cimientos' (The workers are excavating the foundations).

examples.spanish: Los obreros excavan el terreno para los cimientos del edificio.
examples.english: The workers excavate the ground for the building's foundation.

examples.spanish: La máquina excavadora excava un pozo profundo en la obra.
examples.english: The excavator digs a deep hole at the construction site.

english: to fill in / to fill up
context: Essential in construction for directing workers to fill cavities, cracks, or gaps with mortar, concrete, or other materials.

examples.spanish: Necesito rellenar este hueco en la pared con cemento.
examples.english: I need to fill this hole in the wall with cement.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores rellenan la zanja con grava y arena.
examples.english: The workers fill the trench with gravel and sand.

context: Essential in construction for securing materials, equipment, and loads; commonly used in safety protocols: 'Amarra bien las cuerdas antes de izar la carga.'

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores amarran las vigas de acero con cables de seguridad.
examples.english: The workers tie down the steel beams with safety cables.

examples.spanish: Necesito amarrar bien esta carga antes de transportarla.
examples.english: I need to secure this load well before transporting it.

context: Essential verb in construction: 'Necesitamos impermeabilizar la azotea antes de las lluvias' (We need to waterproof the roof before the rains).

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores impermeabilizan el techo con una membrana sintética.
examples.english: The workers waterproof the roof with a synthetic membrane.

examples.spanish: Es necesario impermeabilizar los cimientos antes de construir las paredes.
examples.english: It is necessary to waterproof the foundations before building the walls.

context: Essential verb in construction for quality control: 'El ingeniero inspecciona los cimientos antes de continuar con la obra.'

examples.spanish: El inspector debe inspeccionar todos los cimientos de la construcción.
examples.english: The inspector must inspect all the foundations of the construction.

examples.spanish: Vamos a inspeccionar la calidad de los materiales antes de continuar con la obra.
examples.english: We are going to inspect the quality of the materials before continuing with the construction work.

context: Essential construction verb used to describe bonding materials with cement in masonry and structural work applications.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores cementan los cimientos de la casa nueva.
examples.english: The workers cement the foundations of the new house.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos cementar las grietas en las paredes antes de pintar.
examples.english: We need to cement the cracks in the walls before painting.

context: Essential in construction for lubricating machinery and equipment; workers must engrasar regularly to prevent mechanical failure.

examples.spanish: El trabajador engrasa las máquinas de construcción cada semana.
examples.english: The worker greases the construction machines every week.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos engrasar los rodillos del andamio antes de usarlo.
examples.english: We need to grease the scaffold rollers before using it.

context: Essential construction verb for fastening materials with screws; commonly used in command forms on job sites: 'Tornilla esta placa al marco.'

examples.spanish: El trabajador tornilla la placa de metal al marco de la puerta.
examples.english: The worker screws the metal plate to the door frame.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos tornillar todas las vigas antes de continuar con la construcción.
examples.english: We need to screw all the beams before continuing with the construction.

context: Essential verb in construction: 'Atornilla los paneles al marco con cuidado' (Screw the panels to the frame carefully).

examples.spanish: El carpintero atornilla la bisagra a la puerta.
examples.english: The carpenter screws the hinge to the door.

examples.spanish: Necesito atornillar estas planchas de metal para armar la estructura.
examples.english: I need to screw these metal sheets together to assemble the structure.

context: Essential construction verb: 'Necesitamos taladrar agujeros en la pared antes de instalar los anclajes' (We need to drill holes in the wall before installing the anchors).

examples.spanish: El contratista necesita taladrar la pared para instalar los cables eléctricos.
examples.english: The contractor needs to drill the wall to install the electrical wires.

examples.spanish: Voy a taladrar varios agujeros en el hormigón para fijar las vigas de acero.
examples.english: I am going to drill several holes in the concrete to fix the steel beams.

context: Essential construction verb for instructing workers to cut materials, trim edges, or reduce dimensions on-site.

examples.spanish: El carpintero corta la madera con la sierra.
examples.english: The carpenter cuts the wood with the saw.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos cortar los tubos de metal para la instalación.
examples.english: We need to cut the metal pipes for the installation.

context: Essential construction verb for finishing work; use with protective equipment: 'Lija la superficie antes de pintar' (Sand the surface before painting).

examples.spanish: El carpintero lija la madera para suavizar la superficie.
examples.english: The carpenter sands the wood to smooth the surface.

examples.spanish: Necesito lijar esta pared antes de pintar.
examples.english: I need to sand this wall before painting.

context: Essential construction verb for specifying painting tasks: 'Pinta las paredes de blanco' or 'Necesitamos pintar antes del viernes.'

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores pintan las paredes de la casa nueva.
examples.english: The workers paint the walls of the new house.

examples.spanish: Necesito pintar el marco de la ventana antes de instalarla.
examples.english: I need to paint the window frame before installing it.

context: Essential in construction for describing waterproofing operations: 'Sellamos las grietas antes de aplicar el acabado' (We seal the cracks before applying the finish).

examples.spanish: El contratista sella la grieta en la pared con masilla.
examples.english: The contractor seals the crack in the wall with putty.

examples.spanish: Debemos sellar todas las juntas antes de pintar.
examples.english: We must seal all the joints before painting.

context: Essential in construction for isolating work zones, materials, or thermal/acoustic sections during building projects.

examples.spanish: Necesitamos aislar la zona de construcción con vallas de seguridad.
examples.english: We need to isolate the construction area with safety fences.

examples.spanish: El contratista decidió aislar la pared dañada antes de repararla.
examples.english: The contractor decided to isolate the damaged wall before repairing it.

english: to formwork / to frame with scaffolding
context: Essential in Spanish construction terminology for describing the installation of formwork (cofra) around concrete structures during building projects.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores encofraron la base de hormigón para la nueva estructura.
examples.english: The workers formworked the concrete base for the new structure.

examples.spanish: Debemos encofrar las columnas antes de verter el cemento.
examples.english: We must form the columns before pouring the cement.

english: to pour, to spill, to dump
context: Essential in construction contexts: 'Vierte el concreto en el molde' (Pour the concrete into the mold) is a fundamental instruction on job sites.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores vierten el cemento en el molde para construir la base.
examples.english: The workers pour the cement into the mold to build the foundation.

examples.spanish: Debemos verter el hormigón antes de que se endurezca.
examples.english: We must pour the concrete before it hardens.

context: Essential in construction for describing vibrating machinery, compactors, and equipment oscillation during work operations.

examples.spanish: La hormigonera hace vibrar toda la estructura durante el vertido del cemento.
examples.english: The concrete mixer causes the entire structure to vibrate during the cement pour.

examples.spanish: Los pilotes vibran cuando la máquina compactadora golpea el terreno.
examples.english: The pilings vibrate when the compacting machine strikes the ground.

context: Essential in construction for describing soil compaction, asphalt compression, and material consolidation on job sites.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores compactan el terreno antes de verter el concreto.
examples.english: The workers compact the ground before pouring the concrete.

examples.spanish: Es necesario compactar la base del camino para que sea más resistente.
examples.english: It is necessary to compact the road base to make it more resistant.

context: Essential in construction for specifying dimensions: 'Mide la altura de la pared' (Measure the wall height).

examples.spanish: El carpintero mide la pared antes de instalar los estantes.
examples.english: The carpenter measures the wall before installing the shelves.

examples.spanish: Debemos medir las dimensiones de la habitación para colocar las puertas correctamente.
examples.english: We must measure the dimensions of the room to install the doors correctly.

context: Essential for construction work: 'Marca las líneas de corte con precisión' (Mark the cut lines precisely) or 'Hemos marcado los puntos de referencia' (We have marked the reference points).

examples.spanish: El contratista marca las líneas de construcción con tiza.
examples.english: The contractor marks the construction lines with chalk.

examples.spanish: Necesito marcar los puntos donde van los cimientos.
examples.english: I need to mark the points where the foundations will go.

english: to trace, to draw, to layout
context: Essential verb in construction for describing how to sketch plans, outline routes, or mark building layouts on site.

examples.spanish: El arquitecto traza el plano de la nueva casa.
examples.english: The architect traces the blueprint of the new house.

examples.spanish: Los trabajadores trazan las líneas para los cimientos.
examples.english: The workers trace the lines for the foundations.
